network_summary: Three Chicagoland IL GP locations all operating as 'Affordable Dentures & Implants', franchise brand of Affordable Care LLC — the largest US tooth-replacement DSO, PE-backed by Harvest Partners since 2021 (~$2.7B acquisition from Berkshire Partners). Ben Mehta, DDS is the licensed dentist and NPPES-registered authorized official for the IL professional-corporation entities; he is the affiliated practitioner, not the ultimate owner. The corporate ownership chain is: practice PCs (IL PLLC/PC) -> Affordable Care LLC (DSO platform, Raleigh NC) -> Harvest Partners (private equity). All three locations carry dso_national classification in the database with affiliated_dso='Affordable Care'. Taxonomy codes are general (122300000X, 1223G0001X, 1223P0300X) and is_specialist_only=0, so they are valid GP-denominator entries.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Ben Mehta, DDS, FICOI, FAAIP — licensed dentist and NPPES authorized official / practice owner for the IL Affordable Dentures & Implants professional corporations. He has been with Affordable Dentures & Implants since 2013, previously operated a private GP practice in East Dundee IL for 33 years. He is the affiliated practitioner/local operator, not the DSO's corporate owner.
legal_entities: AFFORDABLE DENTURES & IMPLANTS - DOWNERS GROVE, P.C. (NPI 1740978055)
AFFORDABLE DENTURES & IMPLANTS - AURORA, IL II, P.C. (NPI 1386229540)
Affordable Care LLC (DSO platform entity, Raleigh NC)
durable_artifacts: All three NPIs share the authorized official 'BEN MEHTA' in NPPES federal records (ao_reach=3, ZIPs 60004/60515/60542)
All three entities are named variants of 'AFFORDABLE DENTURES & IMPLANTS' — same brand chain across 3 distinct ZIPs
All three locations already carry entity_classification=dso_national and affiliated_dso='Affordable Care' in practice_locations

Affordable Care website (affordabledentures.com) lists Arlington Heights (922 W Dundee Rd, 60004), Downers Grove (1300 Butterfield Rd, 60515), and North Aurora/Aurora II (106 Hansen Blvd, 60542) as active network locations
Facebook profile for Affordable Dentures Rockford confirms 'Dr. Ben Mehta, DDS, FICOI, FAAIP' as Affordable Dentures & Implants practitioner since 2013
LinkedIn and Wiza profiles confirm Ben Mehta as 'Dentist/practice owner at Affordable Dentures & Implants'
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Affordable Care LLC is the DSO/MSO platform entity behind the Affordable Dentures & Implants brand. It was acquired by Harvest Partners (private equity) from Berkshire Partners in 2021 in a ~$2.7B transaction. Sources: https://harvestpartners.com/portfolio/affordable-care/ (Harvest Partners portfolio page), https://www.dentistryiq.com/practice-management/dsos-and-corporate-dentistry/article/14205397/affordable-care-acquired-by-harvest-partners (DentistryIQ acquisition article), https://pitchbook.com/newsletter/harvest-partners-inks-27b-deal-for-affordable-care (PitchBook deal note), https://berkshirepartners.com/portfolio-companies/affordable-care/ (prior Berkshire portfolio page).
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: No stale/closed indicators. All three locations appear active on the affordabledentures.com locator. AO cluster is NOT a false positive — Ben Mehta is a real affiliated practitioner across these IL locations. The AO signal is corroborated by documentary DSO brand evidence, making this a genuine branded_dso / pe_mso_backed network entry.
evidence_chain: AO signal: BEN MEHTA appears as authorized official on 3 NPPES org-NPI records across ZIPs 60004, 60515, 60542 — all named 'AFFORDABLE DENTURES & IMPLANTS [variant]'. Documentary corroboration: (1) affordabledentures.com locator confirms all 3 addresses as active Affordable Dentures & Implants network locations; (2) Harvest Partners portfolio page confirms Affordable Care as a current PE-backed portfolio company; (3) DentistryIQ, PitchBook, PE Hub, and Berkshire Partners sources confirm the 2021 ~$2.7B Harvest Partners acquisition from Berkshire Partners; (4) Ben Mehta identified on Yelp, LinkedIn, Wiza, and Facebook as 'Dentist/practice owner' — i.e. the affiliated licensed dentist for the PC entities, not the corporate DSO owner. Conclusion: this is a branded national DSO (Affordable Care/Affordable Dentures & Implants) PE-backed by Harvest Partners; Ben Mehta is the AO/affiliated practitioner, not the ultimate owner.
future_app_notes: All three locations are already correctly classified as dso_national with affiliated_dso='Affordable Care' in the database. No reclassification needed. The AO cluster confirms the network identity. If the app tracks PE sponsor at the location level, affiliated_pe_sponsor should be 'Harvest Partners' for all three. Affordable Care operates 400+ locations nationally — any future IL locations of this brand should be auto-classified dso_national/pe_backed. Note: Ben Mehta also operates at Rockford IL (7318 Argus Dr, 61107) which is outside the watched-ZIP set (61107 not in Chicagoland/IL watched ZIPs) — no action needed but worth noting for any future IL expansion of watched ZIPs.
